short_desc: Analyze weapons in the crime scene and their connections to suspects
examples: Focus on the murder weapon: who had access to a shotgun and the skill to use it?
Examine access to the halberd and opportunity for both suspects
Determine which halberd was used in the murder and if there is any evidence pointing to its origin

Do[Check the timing of the murder and whether Freya could have accessed the theater prop]
Observation
Re-examine the evidence to see if the murder weapon was definitively the theater prop or if Freya's halberd could have been used
